content:
#improvement #claude-code

# Add card.reviewed and card.merged hook events

Implemented card.reviewed and card.merged hook events, plus git stash fix. — 2026-03-27

Raised from review of: Implement hook system

Add dedicated hook events: card.reviewed (when card enters review column) and card.merged (after branch merge on done). Currently only card.moved fires for these transitions, making it impossible to script review/merge-specific automation.
